raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmation of surrender and openness to transcendent agency in personal transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a transcendent Power greater than the self exists",
    "human sanity or rationality can be impaired or lost",
    "this Power possesses the capacity to restore sanity",
    "belief or acceptance is a necessary or effective precondition for restoration"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "coherent within frameworks positing a responsive transcendent reality that interacts with human consciousness; internally consistent if the existence and efficacy of such a Power are granted",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a genuine higher Power exists that can and does restore psychological integrity when acknowledged; the act of belief facilitates genuine recovery without blocking other necessary actions",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such Power exists or intervenes, rendering the belief illusory; reliance on it discourages personal agency or evidence-based approaches, perpetuating dysfunction"
}
